word: H4392 - מָלֵא - mâlêʼ - maw-lay' - [idiom] she that was with child

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: [idiom] she that was with child

Original: מלא

Transliteration: mâlê'

Phonetic: maw-lay'

BDB Definition:

  1. full, fulness, that which fills
    1. fully (adverb)

Origin: from H4390

TWOT entry: 1195a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
